message:
fix(test-runner): Add 60s timeout to Phase 1 (Codegen)

Phase 1 was hanging indefinitely when a test file caused an infinite
loop during codegen. This caused CI to hang and eventually report
success with exit code 0 from the script wrapper.

Added watchdog thread that exits with error after 60s if codegen phase
doesn't complete. This ensures CI fails fast instead of timing out.

Related to: "Failed to parse test output, using exit code: 0" in CI
